Why Your Current ₦50k Is Not Working

Your Ad Spend Is Working.
Your Filter Isn't.

The ads are reaching homeowners. The problem is that without a qualification system, your ₦50,000 a week delivers this to your WhatsApp instead of buyers.

✕

Time Waster — Never Buys

No Budget — Wrong Lead

Window Shopper — No Timeline

Disappears — Cold Lead
✕

Quotation Collector
✕
"I'm renting the property."
Not A Decision Maker

You are not getting bad results because your ads are wrong. You are getting bad results because nobody is qualifying the people who see them. Every one of those messages represents wasted ad spend, wasted follow-up time, and a wasted site visit. We qualify all leads before a single number reaches your phone.

What ₦2,500 Actually Buys You

8 Checks Run on Every Lead
Before You Pay a Single Naira.

You do not pay until a homeowner passes all 8. That means ₦2,500 is not the cost of a lead it is the cost of a lead that has already been screened, verified, and confirmed ready. Here is every check we run before you are charged.

Most agencies send you whoever clicked the ad. We send you whoever survived the filter. That is why our partners close 38% of their leads when the industry average is under 10%.

The 8 gates are not a questionnaire. They are a conditional qualification system built into the Facebook form itself — wrong answers disqualify automatically, before the lead is ever created.

The result: every homeowner you call has already confirmed they own the property, have the budget, have a timeline, have a suitable home, and are expecting your call.

How You Get More
From the Same Facebook Budget.

You are already spending on Facebook every week. That does not change. What changes is what comes out of it — because now every naira of that spend runs through our 8-gate qualification system before a single lead reaches your phone.

01
Pay Facebook directly
You send your ad budget to Facebook. We run it through our managed Facebook ad account which protects your investment because we carry all the campaign infrastructure, creative, and pixel data. Minimum ₦50,000 per week, no upper limit.
managed by Tubalcain
02
We Build & Launch
We write the ad creative, build the qualification system, and launch your campaign within 48 hours. You approve the creative before anything goes live.
Live within 48 hours
03
8 Gates Filter Every Lead
Every respondent passes through our 8-question qualification system. Budget, ownership, timeline, home safety, location — all confirmed before delivery.
Zero time-wasters
04
Pay Per Lead Delivered
When a qualified homeowner lands in your WhatsApp you pay ₦2,500 (leads only) or ₦3,500 (leads + follow-up). Zero leads delivered means zero charge from Tubalcain — your ad spend went to Facebook, the same as if you ran the ads yourself.
No leads = no Tubalcain charge
₦3,500 on delivery only

Raw Data — Not a Dashboard Mock-Up

The Actual Google Sheet.
Every Lead. Every Timestamp.

This is the live delivery log — not a report, not a widget. Every row is a real homeowner who passed all 8 gates. Timestamp in Column A. Name, phone, city, budget, and timeline — all captured the moment they qualified.

Column A
Timestamp — exact date and time each lead qualified
Column B
"qualified-lead" tag — confirms the 8-gate pass
Column H
Budget — ₦30k–₦60k, ₦60k–₦100k, Over ₦100k confirmed
Column J
Timeline — Immediately, Soon (2–4 weeks), In the future
Qualified Leads Sheet — Rows 1–25 — Timestamps, Names, Cities, Phones
Rows 26–42 — Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, Ibadan, Benin, Nasarawa, Makurdi
42 Leads. 42 Rows.
Every single entry tagged "qualified-lead" in Column B. Not one unqualified record in the sheet — those never pass the filter.
8 Nigerian Cities
Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, Ibadan, Nasarawa, Makurdi, Benin City, Imo State. The same system. The same standard. Every city.
Budget Pre-Confirmed
Every lead shows a verified monthly power spend. That number is what tells us they can afford solar and that the ROI makes financial sense for them.

Why the 3-Months Follow-Up Is Worth ₦2,000 Per Lead

The Problem
No One Talks About.

Getting pre-qualified homeowners to your WhatsApp is step one. What happens next determines whether they become ₦2M jobs or silent numbers. Most installers lose deals not because of bad leads but because of what happens after the lead arrives.

Scenario 1
"A qualified homeowner filled the form on Monday. By Friday your team finally messaged them. They had already booked a site visit with another installer."
₦2M job — lost to speed
Scenario 2
"You called within the hour. They said they were not ready yet. Your team moved on. Three weeks later that homeowner installed with a competitor who kept following up."
₦2,500 spent — ₦1.8M job lost to silence
Scenario 3
"The lead said 'let me think about it.' Your team had no follow-up sequence, no value-add message, no reason to call back. The deal died without anyone knowing it was still alive."
₦2.4M job — lost to no system
Option 2 — Available as a Standalone Add-On
3-Months Lead Nurture
System

Add this to any lead you receive and we run a 3-Month SMS sequence on that homeowner — 36 messages designed to re-engage, provide value, and move them from "not yet" toward "let's book a site visit." Get it on its own for ₦2,000 per lead, or combine it with lead delivery in Option 3 and save ₦1,000 per lead.

Option 2 — Add-On
₦2,000
per lead · 3 months
36 SMS touches
36 SMS touches per lead
over 12 weeks / 3 months
Or save ₦1,000 with Option 3
🎯 Better Together

Get leads + follow-up as Option 3 and pay ₦3,500 per lead instead of ₦4,500 separately. That is a ₦1,000 saving on every single lead that reaches your WhatsApp.

The 3-Month SMS Sequence
W1
Week 1 — Warm Welcome
3 SMS. Positions the installer as a certified expert. Sets expectations. Builds immediate trust before the first call.
3 SMS this week
W2
Weeks 2–4 — Education & Value
3 SMS per week. Power cost comparisons, solar ROI facts, homeowner success stories. Keeps the installer top of mind while building the homeowner's case for solar.
9 SMS across 3 weeks
W5
Weeks 5–8 — Urgency & Social Proof
3 SMS per week. Result stories from other homeowners in the same city. Price increase warnings. Seasonal NEPA pattern data. Moves "thinking about it" to "I need to decide."
12 SMS across 4 weeks
W9
Weeks 9–12 — Final Close Window
3 SMS per week. Direct re-engagement. Limited availability messaging. Last-chance site visit offer. Designed to convert every remaining warm lead before the 90-day window closes.
12 SMS across 4 weeks
What Is Included
✓
36 SMS per lead over 3 months — 3 per week, every week, for the full 3-Months window
✓
Custom SMS copy written for your city — Abuja, Lagos, Port Harcourt homeowners respond to different triggers. We localise every message.
✓
Fully automated delivery — messages fire on schedule without you or your team doing anything.
✓
Covers up to 50 leads — all leads generated during your active package period are eligible
✓
Re-engagement alerts — if a lead replies to any SMS, you receive an instant notification so your team can follow up immediately while they are warm
✓
Monthly SMS delivery report — open rates, reply rates, and which leads are showing engagement signals worth pursuing
✓
Works with any lead source. Whether your leads come from Tubalcain, another agency, or your own ads — this system keeps them warm for 3 months.
✓
Works alongside your existing follow-up — the SMS sequence runs in the background while your team handles calls and site visits
